instruction:
A study was conducted to detemine whether a the final grade of a student in an introductory psychology course is linearly related to his or her performance on the verbal ability test administered before college entrance. The verbal scores and final grades for $10$ students are shown in the table below.
$\begin{array}{ccc}\hline Student & Verbal Score x & Final Grade y \\ \hline 1 & 67 & 81 \\ \hline 2 & 59 & 72 \\ \hline 3 & 41 & 47 \\ \hline 4 & 56 & 68 \\ \hline 5 & 45 & 54 \\ \hline 6 & 61 & 71 \\ \hline 7 & 53 & 62 \\ \hline 8 & 47 & 55 \\ \hline 9 & 53 & 60 \\ \hline 10 & 33 & 38 \\ \hline \end{array}$
Find the following: a) Compute the value of SST (Total Sum of Squares) answer: [ANS]
(b) Compute the value of SSR (Regression Sum of Squares) answer: [ANS]
(c) Compute the value of SSE (Error Sum of Squares) answer: [ANS]
(d) The coefficient of determination is answer: [ANS]
(e) What percent of variation in the observed values of the response variable is explained by the regression? answer: [ANS]
